subcategories.name: Just for Fun
subcategories.description: Light and playful questions for two

questions.text: If we had a couple superpower, what would it be?
What song would be the soundtrack of our relationship?
If our love story were a movie, what would it be called?
Which cartoon couple are we most like?
If we won a million that had to be spent in one day, what would we buy?
What three things would you take for us to a desert island?

subcategories.name: Memories of Us
subcategories.description: Moments that made us who we are
